articles.title: Foundry and manufacturing coverage
articles.summary: This feed tracks foundry, fab, lithography, wafer, process node, and advanced packaging coverage from semiconductor-focused publications.

articles.title: AI hardware and datacenter silicon coverage
articles.summary: The dashboard filters for AI chip, GPU, HBM, datacenter, and accelerator terms to surface semiconductor stories tied to AI infrastructure.

articles.title: Policy and supply chain coverage
articles.summary: The updater watches for export controls, trade policy, subsidies, supply chain shifts, and regional technology market news.

articles.title: Processor and hardware coverage
articles.summary: The feed includes processor, GPU, server hardware, memory, and PC component reporting from hardware publications.
